zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma de Mainwaring於大約1352年出生在英國爾米德列維其時，她的父親William De Mainwaring IV of chester37歲，母親Elizabeth De Leicester35歲。她於1365年之前與Richard De Wynnington結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1402年在英國爾文寧頓享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma de Mainwaring was born about 1352, in Middlewich, Cheshire, England, her father, William De Mainwaring IV of chester, was 37 and her mother, Elizabeth De Leicester, was 35. She married Richard De Wynnington before 1365. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1402, in Winnington, Cheshire, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma de Mainwaring est née environ 1352, à Middlewich, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William De Mainwaring IV of chester, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth De Leicester, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Richard De Wynnington avant 1365. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1402, à Winnington, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma de Mainwaringが約1352年にイギリスチェシュアイアミッドルイチで生まれた時，父William De Mainwaring IV of chesterは37歳，母Elizabeth De Leicesterは35歳であった。1365年以前にRichard De Wynningtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1402年にイギリスチェシュアイアウィニントンで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Mainwaring(이)가 대략 1352년 영국 체실르 미들루이치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William De Mainwaring IV of chester(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth De Leicester(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1365년 이전 Richard De Wynnington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1402년 영국 체실르 윈잉턴에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma de Mainwaring родилась около 1352 г. в местности миддльвич, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени William De Mainwaring IV of chester было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth De Leicester, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard De Wynnington перед 1365 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1402 г. в местности виннингтон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 51 год.
